items.raw_desc: Matcha szett Matcha Tea Profi készlet, Isamu:The Matcha Tea Isamu pro set allows you to enjoy the traditional Japanese tea ceremony. Includes a chawan tea bowl, a bamboo chashak spoon and a bamboo chasen whisk to easily prepare matcha tea. You put the ground matcha tea into a chawan tea bowl with a spoon and then gradually pour 70° water over it. Whisk the tea with a whisk until it becomes a thick foam. You can prepare a milder version of usucha tea, for this use 2 teaspoons per 70 ml of water and stir the tea in an M-shape. For a stronger koicha tea, pour 3-4 teaspoons of 40 ml of water. Then stir the tea in a gentle circular motion.                     Key Features of Matcha Tea Isamu profi setThe professional set allows you to enjoy the traditional Japanese tea ceremonyIncludes chawan tea bowl, bamboo chashak spoon and bamboo chasen whiskWith the Matcha Tea Isamu set, you can prepare a milder version of matcha usucha tea as well as a stronger koicha tea
